result.stdout:
dotauth.tool 1.0.0
Reimers.dk © 2018-2023

  -i, --client-id                Required. Sets the client id for the tool
                                 client (required).

  -s, --client-secret            Required. Sets the client secret for the tool
                                 client (required).

  -a, --authority                Required. Sets the issuing authority for the
                                 tool (required).

  -r, --redirect-url             (Default: http://localhost:65001/signin) Sets
                                 the redirect url for the authentication flow
                                 (optional). Default value is
                                 `http://localhost:65001/signin`

  -c, --code-challenge-method    (Default: S256) Sets the code challenge method
                                 (optional). Default value is S256

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.
